content: When the balance drops to {{min}}, the wallet will be automatically topped up to {{max}}.

comment.text: This is a descriptive sentence explaining the automatic top-up behavior of a wallet. It appears in the billing section to inform the user about the auto-payment settings, with `{{min}}` and `{{max}}` representing currency values.

usage.context: {t("AutoTopUp")} {t("WhenBalanceDropsTo", { min: formatWalletCurrency!(minBalance, 0), max: formatWalletCurrency!(upToBalance, 0), })}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical error: 'η υπόλοιπο' uses feminine article 'η' with neuter noun 'υπόλοιπο', should be 'το υπόλοιπο'
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Όταν το υπόλοιπο πέσει στο {{min}}, το πορτοφόλι θα αναπληρωθεί αυτόματα στο {{max}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Armenian translation uses a colon (:) at the end instead of a period (.), which changes the sentence structure and suggests the sentence is incomplete or introducing a list
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Երբ մնացորդը իջնի մինչև {{min}}, դրամապանակը ավտոմատ կերպով կավելացվի մինչև {{max}}:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Romanian translation incorrectly states the wallet will be topped up 'with the maximum amount of {{max}}' instead of 'to {{max}}'. This changes the meaning from topping up TO a target balance to topping up BY a maximum amount.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Dacă soldul contului scade până la {{min}}, portofelul va fi alimentat automat până la {{max}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Sinhala translation uses past tense 'පුරවා ඇත' (has been topped up) instead of future tense 'පුරවනු ලැබේ' (will be topped up), completely changing the meaning from a future automatic action to a past completed action
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: එම ඍජුව {{min}} දක්වා අඩු වූ විට, වෝලට් {{max}} දක්වා ස්වයංක්‍රියව පුරවනු ලැබේ.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Incorrect verb form - 'опуститься' (will drop) should be 'опустится' (drops) to match the present tense condition in English
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Коли баланс опустится до {{min}}, гаманець буде автоматично поповнено до {{max}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'ví dụ điện tử' means 'electronic example' instead of 'electronic wallet'. This is a critical mistranslation that changes the meaning from wallet to example.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Khi số dư giảm xuống {{min}}, ví điện tử sẽ tự động được nạp lại lên {{max}}.
